hooks.statusMessage: Checking the target is not a human-owned file...

hooks.command: ls "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/leitwerk/proposals" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^README' | sed 's/^/leitwerk: open proposal awaiting the human (present as multiple-choice, see leitwerk-review): leitwerk\/proposals\//'; exit 0
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for proposals awaiting the human...

hooks.command: [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/core/bin/leitwerk" ] || { echo 'leitwerk: gate binary not built — run: make -C core build' >&2; exit 2; }; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/core/bin/leitwerk" verify --tier ${LEITWERK_TIER:-T2} || exit 2
hooks.statusMessage: Running the leitwerk gate on the repo itself...
